action_text: Click the "Cancel" button on the confirmation dialog
rationale: To delete all duplicates in one action, I should first dismiss the confirmation dialog so I can select the other duplicate rows.

action_text: Confirm deletion of the currently selected record(s) by clicking "Delete"
rationale: If bulk selection isn’t necessary, I can proceed by deleting the currently selected duplicate to make incremental progress toward the goal.

action_text: Click the "Close (X)" button on the confirmation dialog
rationale: As an alternative way to dismiss the overlay, close the confirmation dialog to resume selecting additional duplicates.
Select another duplicate (same short description, not associated with a task) so it can be removed together with the others.
Select the third duplicate with the same short description and no task association to prepare for bulk deletion.
